title: Semeiostachys sclerophylla
taxonomy: Semeiostachys sclerophylla is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It is a member of the Lamiaceae family, which includes mint, basil, and other herbs. The family Lamiaceae is a large and diverse group of plants commonly known as the mint family. The Lamiaceae family is further divided into several subfamilies and tribes, each with distinct characteristics. Within the Lamiaceae family, Semeiostachys sclerophylla is classified as part of the tribe Veroniceae.
